title: Adsvance Media Tech CMS v1.0
summary: Product Requirements Document defining v1.0 of the CMS — powers Adsvance's marketing site and serves as themeable client foundation.

requirements.name: Manage Services
requirements.description: CRUD + reorder services with icon, title, description

requirements.name: Manage Pricing Plans
requirements.description: CRUD pricing plans with features, popular toggle, CTA

requirements.name: Manage Blog Posts
requirements.description: CRUD blog with Quill editor, slug, featured image, publish toggle

requirements.name: Manage Team Members
requirements.description: CRUD team with photo, bio, sort order

requirements.name: Manage Pages / Site Sections
requirements.description: CRUD pages with hero fields, JSON sections

requirements.name: Manage Theme Settings
requirements.description: Colors, fonts, logos via admin theme settings page

requirements.name: Theme Application (Frontend)
requirements.description: CSS custom properties from API theme endpoint

requirements.name: Display Pricing Table
requirements.description: Responsive pricing table with features, CTA, popular ribbon

requirements.name: Contact Form Submission
requirements.description: Name/email/message form, DB storage, email notification

requirements.name: Newsletter Subscription
requirements.description: Single-step email subscribe with duplicate check

requirements.name: Contact Message Management (Admin)
requirements.description: View/manage contact submissions — deferred to v1.1

requirements.name: Admin Dashboard
requirements.description: Stat widgets: services, posts, messages, subscribers

requirements.name: Public REST API
requirements.description: GET endpoints for all content + POST for contact/subscribe

metrics: SM-1: Content update live within 5 min of rebuild
SM-3: Blog post live in under 3 min
